message:
feat(shortcuts): add Ctrl+T for tab picker

- Add tab_picker action to app_shortcuts
- Handle Ctrl+T to show tab picker dialog
- Update README with new shortcut

files.patch:
@@ -64,6 +64,7 @@ termweb help
 | `Ctrl+Q` / `Ctrl+W` | Quit |
 | `Ctrl+L` | Focus address bar |
 | `Ctrl+R` | Reload page |
+| `Ctrl+T` | Show tab picker |
 | `Ctrl+C` | Copy selection |
 | `Ctrl+X` | Cut selection |
 | `Ctrl+V` | Paste |
